.status-bar.background: rgb(253, 249, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(200, 100, 100) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(253, 249, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(253, 249, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(200, 100, 100) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(254, 254, 254) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(253, 249, 247) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

pre.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

tr.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
